name: Josehind Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, bring together the sugar, water, and lemon juice to a boil over medium-high heat. Stir until the sugar dissolves completely. Continue boiling for 1 minute. Allow the syrup to cool until it becomes clear.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. In another bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in the eggs one at a time. Mix in the coconut and lemon rind.
4. Alternating with the flour mixture, add milk to the butter mixture beginning and ending with the flour. Do not overmix.
5. Pour the batter into a 15-1/2" x 10-1/2" x 1-1/2" baking pan that has been greased. Bake in the center of the oven for 25 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan. Let cool on a rack.
6. Pour the cooled syrup over the hot cake and allow it to set.
7. For the frosting, cream together the cream cheese and butter until smooth. Blend in the sugar and vanilla. Beat until smooth. Thin the frosting with milk until it falls in a heavy ribbon from a spoon. Drizzle the frosting in a random pattern over the cake, leaving some open spaces on the surface.
